title: The output of functions that don't return anything should not be used
description: Functions and methods that do not return any value are generally not useful and can lead to confusing or unexpected behavior.
recommendation: Return a value or remove the function/method if it's not needed.

compliant.description: A function that returns a value
A method that returns a value

why_is_this_an_issue: Functions and methods are typically used to perform some action or return a value. If a function or method does not return any value, it may be unintentionally left unused or may cause unexpected behavior when called.
how_to_fix: Ensure that all functions and methods return a value or remove them if they are not needed.
